basic_details.job_title: District Panchayat Kolar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Homoeopathy Specialist Doctor, Ayurveda Specialist Doctor Posts
basic_details.post_name: Homoeopathy Specialist Doctor, Ayurveda Specialist Doctor
basic_details.short_information: District Panchayat Kolar AYUSH Specialist Doctor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of District Panchayat Kolar. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the District Panchayat Kolar AYUSH Specialist Doctor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for all categories as per order; General: 40 years, Cat 2A/2B/3A/3B: 43 years, SC/ST/Cat-1: 45 years; PWD: additional 10 years.

qualification.education_qualification: MS/MD in Homoeopathy, MS in Shalya Tantra, MD in Panchakarma/Kayachikitsa
qualification.details: Homoeopathy Specialist Doctor: MS/MD in Homoeopathy or equivalent with 3 years of experience. BHMS will be considered without PG allowance. Ayurveda Specialist Doctor: MS in Shalya Tantra or MD in Panchakarma/Kayachikitsa.

salary_details.details: Rs. 52550 - 57550 Per Month Homoeopathy Specialist Doctor: Rs. 52550/- + 5000 PG allowance per month Ayurveda Specialist Doctor: Rs. 52550/- + 5000 PG allowance per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Panchayat Kolar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://kolar.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: District Panchayat Kolar Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the District Panchayat Kolar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download District Panchayat Kolar Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: District Panchayat Kolar Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Homoeopathy Specialist Doctor: MS/MD in Homoeopathy or equivalent with 3 years of experience. BHMS will be considered without PG allowance. Ayurveda Specialist Doctor: MS in Shalya Tantra or MD in Panchakarma/Kayachikitsa.

content_sections.heading: District Panchayat Kolar Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for all categories as per order; General: 40 years, Cat 2A/2B/3A/3B: 43 years, SC/ST/Cat-1: 45 years; PWD: additional 10 years.

content_sections.heading: District Panchayat Kolar Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Rs. 52550 - 57550 Per Month Homoeopathy Specialist Doctor: Rs. 52550/- + 5000 PG allowance per month Ayurveda Specialist Doctor: Rs. 52550/- + 5000 PG allowance per month

content_sections.heading: District Panchayat Kolar Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for District Panchayat Kolar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://kolar.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: District Panchayat Kolar Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Panchayat Kolar AYUSH Specialist Doctor posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the AYUSH Specialist Doctor positions at District Panchayat Kolar is 20th August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the AYUSH Specialist Doctor posts?
faq.answer: For the Homoeopathy Specialist Doctor post, MS/MD in Homoeopathy with 3 years of experience is required. For the Ayurveda Specialist Doctor post, MS in Shalya Tantra or MD in Panchakarma/Kayachikitsa is necessary.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 40 years. Age relaxation is provided for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for AYUSH Specialist Doctors?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for AYUSH Specialist Doctor posts. One vacancy is for Homoeopathy Specialist Doctor and the other is for Ayurveda Specialist Doctor.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the AYUSH Specialist Doctor positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 52550 to Rs. 57550. Additionally, a PG allowance of Rs. 5000 per month is also provided.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the District Panchayat Kolar AYUSH Specialist Doctor recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the District Panchayat Kolar recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the AYUSH Specialist Doctor posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve the creation of a Merit List, followed by Document Verification, and an Interview of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of District Panchayat Kolar, which is https://kolar.nic.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, which typically include a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the District Panchayat Kolar AYUSH Specialist Doctor posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the AYUSH Specialist Doctor positions at District Panchayat Kolar is 20th August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.
